_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Patient has urge to pass urine but the urine dribbles out into the vagina during the act of micturition.
Diagnosis confirmed by passing a sound or a metal catheter through the external urethral meatus which comes out through the communicating urethrovaginal opening.
Three swab test may be employed in cases of confusion in diagnosis with Vesicovaginal fistula or ureterovaginal fistula.

preauth.label: Detailed Clinical notes with history, indications, symptoms, signs, examination findings and advice for admission

ppd_preauth.q: Detailed Clinical notes – all vitals, detailed history, symptoms, signs, physical examination including local examination, indication for procedure, planned line of treatment, and advice for admission?
Did clinical presentation and investigation/imaging confirm the diagnosis?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and treatment details?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Clinical presentation or investigation/imaging not indicative of surgery for urethrovaginal fistula repair.
Missing or incomplete detailed clinical notes including history, symptoms, signs, examination findings, indication for procedure, planned line of treatment, or advice for admission.
USG pelvis/abdomen report not provided at pre-authorization.
Three swab test report not provided or inconclusive, especially when differential diagnosis for fistula type is required.
Planned line of treatment for urethrovaginal fistula repair is missing or unclear.
Detailed procedure/operative notes are missing or lack sufficient detail at claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: A fistula is an abnormal communication between two or more epithelial surfaces.
Causes: Part or whole of the urethra is involved along with bladder.
Causes: Small isolated urethrovaginal fistula is caused by injury inflicted during anterior colporrhaphy, urethroplasty, suspension or sling operation for stress incontinence.
Causes: Small isolated urethrovaginal fistula is caused by residual fistula left behind following repair of vesicourethrovaginal fistula.
surgical_options: Surgical repair in two layers followed by continuous bladder drainage as outlined in repair of VVF.
Prior suprapubic or vaginal cystostomy ensures better success.
In cases of complete destruction of the urethra, reconstruction of urethra is to be performed.
additional_information.pre_op_preparation: Prior suprapubic or vaginal cystostomy ensures better success.
additional_information.post_op_care: Continuous bladder drainage after surgical repair.
